params.name: Figaro Marriage
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
params.description:
On Nov 1, 1784, Mozart wrote the greatest opera he ever composed. He spent a year writing "The Marriage of Figaro" which premiered at the Vienna Operahouse. It was a masterpiece containing great music, well-rounded character development, and dramatic interactions. Such a wonderful story had only made the Austrian king yawn once as he was enjoying the 4-hour opera. [Classic Quotes] When a dog bites a man, that is not news, but if a man bites a dog, that is news.
You deserve what you have do …
